GPT 5.4 + OpenClaw: New Native Update & Computer Use Test

Discover how the new GPT 5.4 update transforms OpenClaw into a powerful AI assistant capable of controlling your computer like a human expert. We test the model's speed, browser control, and its ability to build a fully functional website in under five minutes.
